evaluation.metric_definition: Official LongMemEval retrieval semantics: Recall Any/All and nDCG over answer-labeled user turns; abstention questions excluded.

long_memory_small_k_ceiling.disclosure: Official raw-turn Recall All@3 is mathematically capped when one answer contains more than three labeled turns. The answer-cluster/session lane measures whether the system retrieved enough compact evidence clusters for a partner to answer with long-term memory.

hardware.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3080 Laptop GPU, 8192 MiB, 545.84

provenance.cache_disclosure: Each cold run clears WizeMe document vectors, embedding caches, lexical indexes, session-ranking caches, exact retrieval-result cache entries, and learned cross-encoder pair scores before execution. Memory lexical and document-vector indexes are then prepared before timed query retrieval and reported separately as index_preparation_latency. Warm runs retain bounded caches from prior completed runs. Exact retrieval-result cache is disabled for this run; query signatures are still emitted for QA analysis. The same-session candidate magnifier is disabled. Deterministic signature rerank is disabled. Cross-score diagnostics are disabled. Query embeddings, cross-encoder reranking, coverage-aware evidence packing, and retrieval fusion remain inside per-query latency samples.
